name: @ebay-inventory/watcher-service
description: Filesystem watcher runtime for incoming listing images.

scripts.build:deps: pnpm --filter @ebay-inventory/env build && pnpm --filter @ebay-inventory/types build && pnpm --filter @ebay-inventory/data build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build:deps && tsc --noEmit --pretty false -p tsconfig.json
scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
